title: Slovakian Vegetable Stew
description: A hearty, flavorful stew made with a variety of vegetables and a hint of Slovakian spices. Perfect for a cold winter's night.
instructions: Heat 2 tbsp of oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Add the chopped onions and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the sliced mushrooms and cook until they release their liquid and start to brown, about 5 minutes.
Add the chopped carrots and potatoes, stir to combine.
Add the diced tomatoes, ground peppery, ground curry, and enough water to cover the vegetables.
Bring to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 20-25 minutes, or until the vegetables are tender.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
